curation_notes: Patch modifies only src/functions.rs (1 file). The fix replaces the unsound get_aux/set_aux API (which returned raw references and used TypeId-based casting) with an Arc-based API that provides atomic reference counting and Send+Sync bounds, eliminating the data race on concurrent access to SQLite auxiliary data. Locations derived directly from the patch diff: get_aux returned &T without synchronization, and set_aux stored data without thread-safe wrapping. Pre-assigned class race-condition confirmed — CWE-362 and the advisory description ('Auxdata API data race') both align with the patch adding Arc synchronization.
